coupon.source_phrase_block: Half priced admission for up to 2 adults and 4 youths. Patrons should use the Timed-Entry Admission site on the Orchard House website to secure a pre-paid reservation at the 50% discount. Please note: The discount is not applicable to special events, educational programs, large group tours, or merchandise purchases in the Museum Store. For Museum questions, see their website or call 978-369-4118
